rationale.summary: Vote: ABSTAIN. For this NewConstitution (enacted), evidence quality was insufficient for a reliable YES or NO decision. Primary blocker: DRep distribution signal was unavailable for this action. Decisive reason: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "Cardano Constitution v2.4 removes non-binding expectations, the Budget Info Action mechanism, and mandatory CC conduct rules, streamlining governance." and clears the evidence gates. What would enable a directional vote: Provide mitigation evidence; Provide independent assurance. Residual uncertainty: No DRep distribution available. Confidence context: score -0.05; confidence 58.2%.
rationale.summary_raw: Doctrine-aware reasoning layer nudged the score by +0.020 (clamped to ±0.05): Doctrine-aware offline lean for a constitution action: 8 well-supported claim(s), constitution doctrine demands elevated scrutiny. Net bounded adjustment +0.020 (clamped to ±0.05).

sections.title: Intake
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: CARDANO BLOCKCHAIN ECOSYSTEM CONSTITUTION v2.4
Stated amount: not stated in document

Deliverables: Cardano Constitution v2.4 removes non-binding expectations, the Budget Info Action mechanism, and mandatory CC conduct rules, streamlining governance., It adds clear definitions, enforces immutability of proposal documents, and applies treasury audit/accountability safeguards to all withdrawals., This version also incorporates feedback from EMURGO., CARDANO BLOCKCHAIN ECOSYSTEM CONSTITUTION v2.4 https://ipfs.io/ipfs/bafkreih62pydt57supou6dn5lqbf5klr7xu4xi2rrs7tl3thaufiqmvo24 2.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): Cardano Constitution v2.4 removes non-binding expectations, the Budget Info Action mechanism, and mandatory CC conduct rules, streamlining governance.

Claim (other, independently_verifiable, high materiality): It adds clear definitions, enforces immutability of proposal documents, and applies treasury audit/accountability safeguards to all withdrawals.
Claim (other, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This version also incorporates feedback from EMURGO.
Claim (governance, independently_verifiable, high materiality): CARDANO BLOCKCHAIN ECOSYSTEM CONSTITUTION v2.4 https://ipfs.io/ipfs/bafkreih62pydt57supou6dn5lqbf5klr7xu4xi2rrs7tl3thaufiqmvo24 2.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): Simplify governance by removing non-binding expectations and redundant mechanisms like Budget Info Action.
Claim (other, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Improve clarity and consistency through unified terminology, added definitions, and streamlined provisions.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "Cardano Constitution v2.4 removes non-binding expectations, the Budget Info Action mechanism, and mandatory CC conduct rules, streamlining governance." and clears the evidence gates.
Strongest NO: weak controls, unclear delivery, or governance precedent could outweigh the benefit of NewConstitution.
Strongest hold: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.
